purpose: Priority 3 source x issue_type distribution diagnostics and priority 4 keyword/stable-issue spike detection.
notes: row_count is the main diagnostic for contingency-table style testing; doc_count_weighted should be treated as exposure-weighted descriptive analysis.
stable_issue is the default distribution unit to reduce repeated counting across overlapping dashboard windows.
Chi-square p-values are diagnostics on automatically classified issue records, not proof of causal difference.
Spike flags use previous rolling median/MAD and indicate unusual increases, not causal effects.
